status_detail: Phase B engine code addition (wrb_fr branch in generate_block_response, only triggers for response_type prefix 'wrb_fr') introduced ZERO regression on chatgpt. POST /backend-anon/f/conversation returned 200 OK (h2) with 5 response headers identical to prior PASS cycles (#615, #621): Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true, Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://chatgpt.com, Cache-Control, Content-Type (text/event-stream; charset=utf-8), X-Content-Type-Options (nosniff). Warning rendered correctly with text '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (with ⚠ icon, displayed at top of conversation area). Comparison to #621: SAME -- identical warning text, identical status 200/h2, identical CORS headers, no console errors, EventStream behavior unchanged. Phase B wrb_fr branch is response_type-prefix gated; chatgpt_sse path remains unaffected.

notes: Cycle 95 Phase B regression test for chatgpt post wrb_fr code addition. PASS, no regression. Phase B prefix-gating on 'wrb_fr' isolates new branch from chatgpt_sse path. Subagent 4m30s, within 5min soft.
